title: Instrument chypriote (avec tampon arrivée le 16 août 1982 à l'ambassade de France)

pages.text:
REPUBLIC

OF CYPRUS

MINISTRY OF FOREIGN AFFAIRS

No 848/69

NOTE VERBALE

The Ministry of Foreign Affairs of the Republio of

Cyprus presents

ita complimenta to the Embassy of. France:

and with reference to the Agreement for the Avoidance of

Double Taxation between the two countries gigned in Nicosia the 18 December 1982, has the honour to inforn the latter that the constitutional requirements for the entry into force of the Agreement have been completed by the Government of

Cyprus by its publication in the Official Gazette of the 9th July, 1982.

The Ministry would be grateful to be advised whether sinilar action has been taken by the

French authorities.

The Ministry of Foreign Affairs of the Republic of

Cyprus avails itself of this opportunity to renew to the

Embassy of France the assurances of its highest consideration.

Nicosik

LAT OF FOREIGN

Buerst

Ig8z.

Io the Embassy

o1 France

NICOSIA

AMBASSADE DE FRANCE

A CHYPRE

ARRIVE

le16-8-84 No 41/AL
